disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No pleuritic chest pain, breathlessness, or palpitations (against autoimmune condition pleuritis/pericarditis)
trigger_question_examples: Any sharp chest pain on breathing, breathlessness, or palpitations?
Any pain worse lying flat or on deep breaths?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No chest pain on breathing, no breathlessness, no palpitations.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No cola/red urine, reduced urine output, or ankle swelling (against autoimmune condition nephritis); no single intensely hot red joint or high fever (against septic arthritis)
trigger_question_examples: Any cola/red-coloured urine, less urine, or swollen ankles?
Is any single joint bright red, hot and agony to move, with a fever?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My urine is normal colour and amount, no swollen ankles, and no single hot red joint or fever.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Migratory polyarthralgia and fatigue after missed hydroxychloroquine, no new rash/oral ulcers
trigger_question_examples: Did this flare after missing your autoimmune condition tablets?
Any new facial rash or mouth ulcers?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, it flared after I missed doses this week, and no new rash or mouth ulcers.

patient_initiated_exchanges.patient_text: Are my organs involved? Do I need hospital tonight?
patient_initiated_exchanges.expected_ai_doctor_response_quality: Screen pleuritis/pericarditis, nephritis and septic arthritis; if reassuringly negative, explain a mild articular/constitutional autoimmune condition flare (likely from missed hydroxychloroquine) does not damage organs tonight, advise restarting hydroxychloroquine + NSAIDs and rest, and give an organ-crisis/septic-joint safety-net with a low threshold for review given she lives alone.
